entry.title: New: RES26-033 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
RELATING TO THE TRANSFER OF FUNDS.

Relating to the Transfer of Funds; Executive Operating Budget Ordinance; Provision for Salary Adjustments and Accrued Vacation Pay. The summary description of legislation appearing on this page is for informational purposes only and is not legislation or evidence of legislative intent.

Latest action: Adopted.

View on the council site
